feature_flag.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_BACKEND_API
feature_flag.false_behavior: Parcel Detail Drawer continues to render the selected static parcel-search record.
feature_flag.true_behavior: Parcel Detail Drawer opens immediately from the selected static/search record, then hydrates richer parcel detail from FastAPI.
feature_flag.fallback_behavior: If the backend request fails, times out, returns 404, or returns an invalid shape, the drawer keeps rendering the static selected parcel and shows a non-blocking fallback status.

remaining_static_dependencies: public/intelligence/parcel-search-index.json remains available for static search and detail fallback.
Owner and mailing context remain static until the backend parcel detail response includes those fields.
Map selection and geometry focus remain unchanged and are not connected to backend parcel detail.

validation.browser_smoke_note: Full in-browser flag-on drawer interaction was not fully repeated in this pass; compiled frontend path, backend endpoint, and dev server health were verified.
